LoseText: Field test aborted... foreign entity must be recycled.

Name: Andrew

LoseText: The light in here got snuffed out.

Name: Enzo
LoseText: Now I'm lost and a loser...

Name: Raditz
LoseText: How could this little brat's attack weaken me so much!?

Name: Nate
LoseText: I was hoping to win an escape rope off you.

Name: Mark
LoseText: I shouldn't battle anymore. I'm content to just fish.

Name: Max
LoseText: I'm telling my mom on you!

Name: Aaron

Name: Selena
LoseText: It's getting too hot in here!

Name: Lisa
LoseText: Ugh, fine, you can cut in line, I guess.

Name: Wyatt
LoseText: It seems that my theory has been disproven.

Name: Jack
LoseText: We shouldn't be fighting in here!

Name: Katie
LoseText: I think I hit a rock!

Name: Carla
LoseText: It is absurd that I lost!

Name: Cameron
LoseText: Oh man, the boss is gonna have my head!

Name: Genevieve
LoseText: How did I lose to a pipsqueak like you?!

Name: Alan
LoseText: I thought I'd win for sure!

Name: Lorenzo
LoseText: The sand got in my eyes!

Name: Ameen
LoseText: Ack, I wasn't expecting to lose!

Name: Bridget
LoseText: I didn't even have a chance to use my special herbs in battle!

Name: Ismail
LoseText: I can't rob nothin' without my Pokemon!

Name: Kamal
LoseText: I should have just stuck to being a merchant!

Name: Natasha
LoseText: I was so sure I would win!

Name: Bruce
LoseText: I was so sure I would win!

Name: Charlie
LoseText: I was so sure I would win!

Name: Chandler
LoseText: It was a mistake challenging you!

Name: Thalia
LoseText: Oh, you did not just beat me! Rude!

Name: Timothy
LoseText: I was so certain I would win!

Name: Melissa
LoseText: I haven't fought like that in years!

Name: Harvey
LoseText: Man, I lost my catch and the battle!?

Name: Taijaun
LoseText: You showed me up real good!

Name: Eli
LoseText: This is not going according to plan!

Name: Erik
LoseText: Phew, looks like the mountain wasn’t on my side today…

Name: Lucky
LoseText: Hmph, I guess I underestimated you…

Name: Carla
LoseText: Looks like you’re better prepared than I thought!

Name: Stavrov
LoseText: Heh, guess I’m better off sticking to the trails…

Name: Niles
LoseText: Interesting... Your team’s synergy is impressive. I’ll need to take notes on this!

Name: Patricia
LoseText: No way! You've cracked the code... for now!

Name: Buffy
LoseText: Whew, that was a tough climb... you win this one!

Name: Adam
LoseText: Looks like I won't be seeing the peak today... but you might!

Name: Willow
LoseText: Impossible... these caves must be throwing me off my game.

Name: Spike
LoseText: I thought my team was rock solid... guess not!

Name: Paige
LoseText: Looks like the view’s better from down here, after all!

Name: Leo
LoseText: Guess my knowledge of ancient history didn’t help me win...

Name: Naomi
LoseText: Guess I need to train both myself and my Pokémon a bit more!

Name: Clement
LoseText: Wow, looks like I’ve still got a long way to go!

Name: Fatima
LoseText: I'm going for a dip in the water...

Name: Cliff
LoseText: Guess no treasure for me this time... you earned it!

Name: Piper
LoseText: Looks like I’ve hit my limit. You’re tougher than a mountain trail!

Name: Phoebe
LoseText: Man, you’re a true explorer! I’ve got more hiking to do.

Name: Drew
LoseText: Seems I’m not as powerful as the relics hidden here...

Name: Malcolm
LoseText: Whew, I guess I’ll take a break here after that one.

Name: Yusuf
LoseText: I was blindsided by your strength!

Name: Chad
LoseText: You showed me up, for sure!

Name: Camilo
LoseText: I'm just trying to look out for people's safety!

Name: Eliza
LoseText: I was so sure I'd win...

Name: Edward
LoseText: I'll go back to fishing now...

Name: Brooke
LoseText: I need to go back to a PokeCentre now, ugh.

Name: Alex
LoseText: I should have packed some medicine...

Name: Johannes
LoseText: I have failed you, Lord Arceus!
I don't get paid enough for this.
I am not dealing with this.
I need to do my job!

Name: Taylor
LoseText: I didn't think I would lose!

Name: Luke
LoseText: I'm only doing this because the bosses told me to!

Name: Brian
LoseText: I didn't even want to do this!

Name: Enzo
LoseText: I almost fell into the water!

Name: Oni
LoseText: I thought I would do better than that...

Name: Katrina
LoseText: I was tired already from my swim!

Name: Anchal
LoseText: Now you've left me helpless against the jungle...

Name: Kitembe
LoseText: I was hoping to win an escape rope off you!

Name: Pooja
LoseText: I was compromised already. No fair!

Name: Darsh
LoseText: Are you the cause for the disturbance?

Name: Disha
LoseText: What has stirred the Pokemon so!?

Name: Brahma
LoseText: Such wanton disrespect to our Lord Dialga!

Name: Jair
LoseText: You are not the one responsible for this...

Name: Ishank
LoseText: The Priestess shall have my head!

Name: Lakshmi
LoseText: I cannot contact the spirits for help!

Name: Matty
LoseText: I almost fell off my bike!

Name: Cillian
LoseText: Can I have some money, please?

Name: Crisco
LoseText: I'm not as tough as I thought I was...

Name: Rambo
LoseText: I'll go sleep in the train shed now.

Name: Linda
LoseText: Well, I shoulda figured I'd lose...

Name: Kylie
LoseText: Ain't many safe places no more.

Name: Cameron
LoseText: Someday I'll be a famous artist

Name: Albert
LoseText: What did you do to my dog?!

Name: Rosalind
LoseText: How could you do that to my puppy?!

Name: Christina
LoseText: And now I have to go back to town...

Name: Kenzie
LoseText: I'll knock you off this platform myself!

Name: Theresa
LoseText: And now I have to go back to town...

Name: Sonny
LoseText: I didn't think I'd need to evacuate!

Name: Darius
LoseText: The crystals are bad for you?!

Name: Jax
LoseText: I'm throwing out the crystals I've collected!

Name: Milhouse
LoseText: Go away, I'm trying to fish here!

Name: Lawrence
LoseText: Man, I just started my swim too!

Name: Eddie
LoseText: Well, now I need to go back to shore to heal up!

Name: Arturo
LoseText: I have not finished my penance...

Name: Colton
LoseText: I need a drink of water!

Name: Theodora
LoseText: The sand got in my eyes!

Name: Riley
LoseText: I'm feeling sick after drinking from the cactii!

Name: Davie
LoseText: The grassy paths have me confused!

Name: Massimo
LoseText: My exile has not yet concluded.

Name: Greg
LoseText: I can't believe I lost again!

Name: Kevin
LoseText: If I had fossil Pokemon, this would have turned out differently!

Name: Nate
LoseText: I'm a bit disoriented from the fall.

Name: Harold
LoseText: I'm going back to looking for lost relics!

Name: Marcus
LoseText: My life for the Ethereal Guild!

Name: Fatima
LoseText: Giratina, have you abandoned me too?

Name: Amina
LoseText: The Gods have abandoned us all!

Name: Nasser
LoseText: The way has been opened to you...

Name: Lana
LoseText: Giratina, why do you desert me?

Name: Yousef
LoseText: What is the meaning of this?!

Name: Ranya
LoseText: No! The Priest and Priestess' ritual must not be disrupted!

Name: Celeste
LoseText: Now I need to heal up!

Name: Charity
LoseText: Ugh, now I have to go back to town...

Name: Joao
LoseText: Man, I was almost to Ursa Village!

Name: Tristan
LoseText: I can't believe I lost to you!

Name: Lila
LoseText: I was so sure I would win!

Name: Darryl
LoseText: How did I lose to someone like you!?

Name: Celeste
LoseText: I'll make sure you pay for this!

Name: Nabil
LoseText: You stayed cool under pressure. Well done!

Name: Bilal
LoseText: You've beaten me fair and square. Impressive!

Name: Khalid
LoseText: You overcame the heat and me. Great job!

Name: Yasmine
LoseText: You bested me in my own terrain. Well played!

Name: Aisha
LoseText: You've shown great skill. Keep it up!

Name: Laila
LoseText: You were amazing! I need to train harder.

Name: Imran
LoseText: I could have become so rich if it wasn't for you!

Name: Saad
LoseText: I will never understand you peoples' resistance to progress!

Name: Omar
LoseText: Fine, you can continue languishing in this undeveloped pit!

Name: Hassan
LoseText: You've mastered the wilds of this desert. Well done!

Name: Farid
LoseText: You've conquered me and the cliffs. Impressive!

Name: Omar
LoseText: You handled my desert Pokémon brilliantly. Congratulations!

Name: Dina
LoseText: Even the Mandibuzz were impressed by your skills. Well done!

Name: Jamila
LoseText: You've emerged victorious in this harsh environment. Well done!

Name: Fatima
LoseText: You adapted well to the changing terrain. Great job!

Name: of the Valley
LoseText: Such power... I am in awe!

Name: of the Sands
LoseText: Even the sand was not enough to shield me from your power!

Name: of the Sun
LoseText: The sun shines upon you rather than me!

Name: Blaine
LoseText: Well, that was a miserable experience.

Name: Brooklyn
LoseText: Wow, you really know how to battle!

Name: Raquel
LoseText: I thought I had a good strategy, but you proved me wrong.

Name: Luke
LoseText: I can't believe I lost again.

Name: Giovanni
LoseText: You're definitely one of the strongest trainers I've ever faced.

Name: Anissa
LoseText: That was a great battle! I'm glad we could both learn from it.

Name: Janet
LoseText: I underestimated you and your Pokemon.

Name: Nigel
LoseText: You may have won this battle, but the Ethereal Guild's plans will continue.

Name: Lenny
LoseText: Don't think you've seen the last of us. We'll get our revenge!

Name: Micah
LoseText: You got lucky this time. Next time, we won't hold back.

Name: Cora
LoseText: You may have defeated me, but the Ethereal Guild will always find a way to rise again.

Name: Lucien
LoseText: Your victory means nothing. The Ethereal Guild's power is far greater than you can imagine.

Name: Sierra
LoseText: This battle is inconsequential. The Ethereal Guild's influence spreads far and wide.

Name: Natalia
LoseText: You think defeating me will stop the Ethereal Guild? You're sorely mistaken.

Name: Theo
LoseText: Our organization is vast and powerful. One loss won't hinder our grand scheme.

Name: Maya
LoseText: You're just a temporary obstacle. The Ethereal Guild will achieve its goals, mark my words.

Name: Kylo
LoseText: You're stronger than I thought, but the real challenge lies ahead. Our forces won't be defeated so easily.

Name: Drake
LoseText: Draco City will still crumble under the might of the Ethereal Guild!

Name: Leeroy
LoseText: I underestimated your strength, but the Ethereal Guild's reign of chaos will prevail!

Name: Framboise
LoseText: Don't get too cocky. The Ethereal Guild's forces are just getting started. You won't win in the end.

Name: Khloe
LoseText: Argh... How could we lose to the likes of you? This won't be the end!

Name: Aminah
LoseText: Don't get too cocky. We may have lost this round, but the Ethereal Guild will have its revenge!

Name: Mukesh
LoseText: You may have defeated us, but our plans are already in motion. You can't stop us!

Name: Rishabh
LoseText: Draco City will still fall to the Ethereal Guild's might!

Name: Malachai
LoseText: You got lucky this time, but the Ethereal Guild's darkness will engulf this city, mark my words!

Name: Benedictus
LoseText: It seems the caves favor you today… but the crystals still call.

Name: Goga
LoseText: Your resolve is strong. The caves have accepted your spirit.

Name: Lucille
LoseText: Our battle was but a blink to these ancient walls. You have earned their respect.

Name: Theodora
LoseText: The caves chose you today… but I will remain.

Name: Riley
LoseText: It seems the spirits favor you... for now.

Name: Michael
LoseText: The fog lifts for you. Your path is clearer now.

Name: Nikolas
LoseText: The voices spoke true… you were the stronger one today.

Name: Mina
LoseText: The spirits have chosen you. I will await their next call.

Name: Aria
LoseText: It seems the fog cleared for you… for now.

Name: Gigi
LoseText: The unseen favored you today… But their gaze is always shifting.

Name: Charles
LoseText: The caves have spoken... You walk their path with strength.

Name: Celestina
LoseText: The spirits chose you as their voice today… I’ll wait for their next message.

Name: Scarlet
LoseText: It seems the energy flows through you this time.

Name: Parker
LoseText: The caves accepted your strength... You’ve earned their favor.

Name: Robert
LoseText: You’ve earned the stones’ respect… Today, they were on your side.

Name: Donald
LoseText: It seems the caves favor you… Perhaps they will reveal their secrets to you.

Name: Tim
LoseText: The In-Between still lies beyond reach... But perhaps you will walk it one day.

Name: Kamala
LoseText: The visions elude me today… but perhaps you will see what I cannot.

Name: Alexandria
LoseText: The bridge remains unseen for now, but the visions... perhaps they wait for you.

Name: John
LoseText: It seems the path to the In-Between evades me, but perhaps it will reveal itself to you.

Name: Ayanna
LoseText: The fog has not lifted for me… but your journey might still lead you there.

Name: Noah
LoseText: No way... I underestimated your strength. You're a true force to be reckoned with.

Name: Isaiah
LoseText: Wow, you really know how to battle in this challenging terrain.

Name: Marnie
LoseText: You bested me fair and square.

Name: Lucille
LoseText: You've proven yourself on these rocky ledges.

Name: Melissa
LoseText: Ack. The fog obscured my ability to hit you!

Name: Nathan
LoseText: I need to find some berries to heal my Pokemon up now.

Name: Kirsten
LoseText: Your skill shines through the fog!

Name: Amy
LoseText: I need to go back to Ara City now...

Name: Spirit
LoseText: We are trapped in the cycle of our past.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Defeated once more... the chains of our mistakes continue to bind us.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Your victory is a reminder of the futility in our eternal struggle.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Even in defeat, the shadows of our conflict refuse to release their grip.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Another loss... a bitter taste of the regrets that haunt us still.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: You have bested us, but we remain trapped in this ghostly dance of battle.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Our spirits remain tethered to this place, reliving our fallen destinies...

Name: Spirit
LoseText: A fleeting victory for you, yet we remain ensnared in our perpetual duel.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Even in defeat, the echoes of our conflict resonate through these ancient ruins.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Our curse remains, forever bound to this realm.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Your victory... a temporary respite from our eternal anguish.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: Our spectral battle shall endure beyond time.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: The echoes of our defeat reverberate through the shadows, never to be silenced.

Name: Spirit
LoseText: In defeat, we find solace in the eternal dance of victory and loss.

Name: Sentry
LoseText: Intruder's prowess acknowledged. Deactivating combat mode.

Name: Sentry
LoseText: Defeat acknowledged. System disengaged. Ceasing hostilities.

Name: Sentry
LoseText: Error in combat calculations. Disengaging systems.

Name: Guardian
LoseText: Defensive measures ineffective. Disabling combat protocols.

Name: Sentry
LoseText: Sentry defeated. Reverting to non-combat status.

Name: Sentry
LoseText: Objective not achieved. Analyzing combat data for optimization purposes.

Name: Sentry
LoseText: Target resistance exceeded projected estimations. Recalibrating offensive protocols.

Name: Francois
LoseText: I may have lost here, but Lord Angelo will still be victorious!

Name: Laurent
LoseText: I proved no match for you in single combat!

Name: Norma
LoseText: Lord Angelo ascends to the Origin already!

Name: Donna
LoseText: Lord Angelo shall erase you like the insignificant speck you are!

Name: Naomi
LoseText: Our plans are already in motion!

Name: Harvey
LoseText: You will never stop Lord Angelo now!

Name: Mike
LoseText: Give up, it's too late for you to save Creation!

Name: Soldier
LoseText: You've torn a stitch in the fabric of reality, yet we persist.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Our whispers will linger in the void.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Even in defeat, our collective will endures.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Your triumph is a mere chapter in our unending story.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Your resistance wanes against the current of our consciousness.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: We are the silent tide that engulfs all.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Our essence lingers in the unseen corners.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: You cannot silence the echoes of your impending doom.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: You are but a fleeting disturbance.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: The night bows to the sovereignty of our collective being.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Your conquest fades, while our essence remains, eternal and undisturbed.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: We are but one of many voices.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: We are a seamless union, eternal and unyielding!

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Your victory dissipates like a fleeting nightmare.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: Your victory... temporary... the anomalies' influence... eternal.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: The anomalies' power... it will prevail.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: The anomalies' darkness knows no bounds.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: I fall... but the anomalies... they will consume you all

Name: Refugee
LoseText: If I fall, another shall rise to take my place!

Name: Refugee
LoseText: The anomalies' dominion over this realm remains unchallenged.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: The anomalies' influence will consume you in the end!

Name: Refugee
LoseText: The anomalies' influence will consume you eventually.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: We shall consume your essence eventually.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: My brethren have been alerted to your presence.

Name: Refugee
LoseText: We watch from the darkness, no matter where you go!

Name: Refugee
LoseText: The Master will assimilate you eventually!

Name: Dungeon Guard
LoseText: We should have confiscated your Pokemon!

Name: Dungeon Guard
LoseText: You've bested me... but others will stop you.

Name: Larry
LoseText: Guess swinging a pickaxe doesn’t make you a top battler...

Name: Rick
LoseText: Tch. Maybe you’re stronger than you look...

Name: Morty
LoseText: Don’t expect everyone else to roll over so easily.

Name: Clarence
LoseText: Looks like I’m punching out early today...

Name: Sterling
LoseText: Guess the Conclave won’t be sending me any bonuses after this...

Name: Roberto
LoseText: Hmph. Maybe you’re tougher than you look, but you’re still in over your head.

Name: Aaron
LoseText: I'm not cut out for this life!

Name: Vinny
LoseText: I need to get out of here!

Name: Lou
LoseText: I'm not cut out for this job!

Name: Calvin
LoseText: I do not get paid enough for this!

Name: Phil
LoseText: You bleeding hearts with your compassion for Pokemon!

Name: Lucius
LoseText: Pokemon are tools, don't you see?!

Name: Security Guard
LoseText: I failed to stop the intruder!

Name: Security Guard
LoseText: I need stronger Pokemon to defend this facility!

Name: Security Guard
LoseText: How did you beat me so handily?!

Name: Arboretum Security
LoseText: Elara will be furious with me!

Name: Arboretum Security
LoseText: I fear Elara's wrath more than I fear you!

Name: Micah
LoseText: I don't have a job and I have to give you money!?

Name: Lou
LoseText: Man, I am such a loser!

Name: Lenny
LoseText: All I wanted to do was to provide for my family.

Name: Remy
LoseText: This new government is just as bad as the Conclave!

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: Libram City is still there, isn't it? Hidden... safe...

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: Thank you. I can rest again.

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: I think I'll stay by the lake a little longer.

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: I don't fear the dark anymore. It's the memory that burns.

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: You shine like the torches we lost. Don't let it go out.

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: It was quiet at the end. I liked the quiet.

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: It all burns away, doesn't it?

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: Is it over? Was it ever real?

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: Maybe now the sands shall forget me...

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: There was nothing here for us.

Name: Pioneer
LoseText: We were dreamers... we were woken up.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Permission to stand down... at last?

Name: Soldier
LoseText: The encampment is safe now... right?

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Why can I not escape this torment?

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Even the fiercest guard eventually succumb to the sands.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Captain? Captain, come in... no response...

Name: Soldier
LoseText: No more orders... no more fights... just the dust.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Forgive me, comrades... I couldn't stop them.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: You'll regret this when the sands claim you too...

Name: Soldier
LoseText: Perhaps now I can fade with the winds...

Name: Soldier
LoseText: You walk on, but the desert always wins.

Name: Soldier
LoseText: At last, I can stop fighting...

Name: Carrie
LoseText: Hope that battle made you feel better!

Name: Keanu
LoseText: I came crashing down to earth...

Name: Lucas
LoseText: Ok, you've ruined my peace. Go away now!

Name: Lisa
LoseText: I shouldn't be battling on the official paths!

Name: Nate
LoseText: I was tired already from berry planting...

Name: Catherine
LoseText: I should feed some of my Pokemon berries to restore their health now.

Name: Matt
LoseText: I'll go pass out in a pile of leaves now...

Name: Alexa
LoseText: Ooh, I almost made it back to Ara City without losing!

Name: Brett
LoseText: I won't let this loss depress me...

Name: Arden
LoseText: So... you've got more grit than I thought.

Name: Kaelen
LoseText: Even fire’s beauty fades when the stronger flame burns brighter...

Name: Holt
LoseText: Guess you’re the one who adapts faster.

Name: Elira
LoseText: The fire accepts your strength… as do I.

Name: Clara
LoseText: Okay, okay... guess I got burned worse than you did.

Name: Luiz
LoseText: Whew… I guess I should take my own advice.

Name: Oliver
LoseText: Guess they’ve adapted better than my team today…

Name: Jake
LoseText: Yikes… that’s a slip-up I’ll have to own.

Name: Amy
LoseText: You’ve got the strength for it, too.

Name: Liz
LoseText: I got burned out before you did…

Name: Beth
LoseText: Looks like I was a little too caught up in the view.

Name: Darius
LoseText: I think I learned more than you did.

Name: Elise
LoseText: Looks like you didn’t need my support after all.

Name: Kaia
LoseText: And today, I’m the one who’s been tested.

Name: Nelson
LoseText: I hurt myself jumping off the ledge!

Name: Camilo
LoseText: I don't see many trainers like you!

Name: Spencer
LoseText: This is why I want to fish alone...

Name: Chuck
LoseText: Oh jeez, I wasn't expecting to lose!

Name: Clyde
LoseText: I gotta give you my money?!

Name: Johnny Tightlips
LoseText: How did I lose to someone like you!?

Name: George
LoseText: I learned a lot from you!

Name: Lisa
LoseText: I chose well to train here!

Name: Claire
LoseText: You are truly a seasoned battler!

Name: Ibrahim
LoseText: I will adapt my techniques after this fight!

Name: Amina
LoseText: I assumed I would handily win. You showed me I was wrong.

Name: Barry
LoseText: I did not expect to lose. Congratulations!

Name: Michael
LoseText: The rain was in my eyes!

Name: Bridget
LoseText: I'm not crying, that's the rain!

Name: Scott
LoseText: Yikes! You're as rough as the waves!

Name: Kaelith
LoseText: Dragged under, but not forgotten! The tide will rise again!

Name: Varros
LoseText: So the land still holds you… for now.

Name: Selric
LoseText: Cough up your breath… the sea always takes it back in the end.

Name: Drovak
LoseText: The song falters, but the chorus swells ever louder beneath the waves.

Name: Thalos
LoseText: Lightning spared you today… but thunder always returns.

Name: Maltheris
LoseText: You’ve broken the circle, but the storm has a thousand hands.

Name: Ethan
LoseText: Ahh! I almost fell off my raft!

Name: Prakash
LoseText: I knew I didn't like outsiders...

Name: Gurjeet
LoseText: Your roots run deeper than mine today.

Name: Rahul
LoseText: Like mist, I scatter before the sun.

Name: Asif
LoseText: Your spirit drums louder than mine.

Name: Gurleen
LoseText: Your strength flows like the river after the rains… I cannot resist it.

Name: Birinder
LoseText: Ha… it seems I’m the one who sunk instead.

Name: Humaira
LoseText: Ugh, the buzzing bugs distracted me!

Name: Suresh
LoseText: Heh… it seems I was the vine cut today.

Name: Harpal
LoseText: You shine like sunlight breaking through the canopy.

Name: Ashoka
LoseText: Your voice carried stronger than mine today.

Name: Priti
LoseText: I see now… you honor tradition too, in your own way.

Name: Jaspreet
LoseText: Your current runs stronger than mine.

Name: Umar
LoseText: Like the sun breaking through mist… I couldn’t withstand your light.

Name: Abtar
LoseText: Hah… today, the mud failed me.

Name: Asheara
LoseText: Your spirit holds firm… the Bayou accepts you, for now.

Name: Izsha
LoseText: You tread lighter than I thought.

Name: Lisha
LoseText: Still, your power cannot be denied.

Name: Dr.Halverson
LoseText: The experiment… was never meant… to end like this…

Name: Moira
LoseText: Help me back to the Refuge?

Name: Petr
LoseText: Guh! That battle woke me up from my stupor!

Name: Wojciech
LoseText: I think I ate a suspicious-tasting mushroom...

Name: Lukasz
LoseText: I don't want to be here when the wards fail.

Name: Luna
LoseText: I'm glad you're on our side!

Name: Rhun
LoseText: He promised the faithful would not fall...

Name: Corvin
LoseText: Why am I still... empty inside?

Name: Thren
LoseText: Then I was the weak one...

Name: Seris
LoseText: Then why... am I still afraid?

Name: Varik
LoseText: So this is the measure of conviction...

Name: Selra
LoseText: Tempered steel still snaps, if struck hard enough.

Name: Kaevra
LoseText: Bravery and doom look the same from here...

Name: Tharos
LoseText: So even here strength still matters...

Name: Yselle
LoseText: For a moment, I thought he would reach for me...

Name: Morvain
LoseText: Your struggle will be beautiful to observe.

Name: Kaelis
LoseText: You've lost less than we have...

Name: Rethan
LoseText: You are not delaying... you are choosing.

Name: Voren
LoseText: You were meant for the altar...

Name: Malek
LoseText: I should have refined myself further.

Name: Darric
LoseText: The tincture must not be spilled!

Name: Caldus
LoseText: The master will not be pleased!

Name: Sacrifice
LoseText: My torment is at an end!

Name: Sacrifice
LoseText: Can I find my body again?

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: How did I capitulate so easily to this taint?

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: The evil had infected my mind!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: You cleansed my mind of the evil corrupting me!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: The Soulstone cannot hold this much evil!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: You are a beacon of purity!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: You cleansed me of corruption... thank you!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: I am no longer blinded by false evils!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: My vision is clouded no more!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: You saved me from the corruption!

Name: Soulstone Guard
LoseText: You are worthy... you will save us!

Name: Zoe
LoseText: It is getting hot out here!
Oof, I did not expect such a convincing defeat!
That battle was worth the trouble!
I learned a lot from this battle!
You are as tough as they claim!
Jeez, you really showed me up!
I did not expect to lose...

Name: Anime
LoseText: I blame Dem's AI for my loss.

Name: MissNyakura
LoseText: Can't even read up... Imagine reading.

Name: WitchyAlex
LoseText: Wow, that was hot lmao. My puppers though :c

Name: Ignotus68
LoseText: Be it by luck or by skill, a fine battle indeed.

Name: YGS
LoseText: Damn... Welp, using your favorites can't win 'em all.

Name: Riptidecord
LoseText: This ain't a street fight! It's a trench war!

Name: Riptidecord
LoseText: You used a fire type, didn't you?

Name: DemICE
LoseText: You could be a fine space explorer yourself you know!

Name: DemICE
LoseText: You could be a fine space explorer yourself you know!

Name: DemICE
LoseText: You could be a fine space explorer yourself you know!

Name: DemICE
LoseText: You could be a fine space explorer yourself you know!
